texto: People ask: Why should I care about the ocean? Because the ocean is the cornerstone of earth's life support system, it shapes climate and weather. It holds most of life on earth. 97% of earth's water is there. It's the blue heart of the planet — we should take care of our heart. It's what makes life possible for us. We still have a really good chance to make things better than they are. They won't get better unless we take the action and inspire others to do the same thing. No one is without power. Everybody has the capacity to do something.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Sylvia A. Earle que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “People ask: Why should I care about the ocean? Because the ocean is the cornerstone of earth's li…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre motivacao, aqua, conservation, com foco em inspiracao e conservation.
